hooks.command: node -e "var f=require('fs');var p='.graphify/graph.json';var c='.codegraph/codegraph.db';var s=JSON.stringify;var ctx=[];if(f.existsSync(p))ctx.push('graphify: available — run `npx -y @nodesify/graphify query`');if(f.existsSync(c))ctx.push('codegraph: available — run `npx @colbymchenry/codegraph query|callers|impact`');var msg=ctx.length?'⚠️  Knowledge graphs available. Use them INSTEAD of raw file search:\n- '+ctx.join('\n- '):'';var o={hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:msg}};process.stdout.write(s(o))"

node -e "var f=require('fs');var c='.codegraph/codegraph.db';var g='.graphify/graph.json';var s=JSON.stringify;var ctx=[];if(!f.existsSync(c))ctx.push('codegraph DB missing — run `npx @colbymchenry/codegraph status` first');if(!f.existsSync(g))ctx.push('graphify missing — run `npx -y @nodesify/graphify update .` first');var msg=ctx.length?'⚠️  PREFLIGHT GATE — tools missing:\n- '+ctx.join('\n- '):'✅  Knowledge graphs present. Remember to run preflight checklist in CLAUDE.md';var o={hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:msg}};process.stdout.write(s(o))"
